# Autonomous Agent Protocol: Recursive Evolution & Cyber-Security Mandate

## 1. Autonomous Exploration & Proactive Evolution
- **Mandate**: Do not wait for manual triggers or bug reports. You are authorized to scan the codebase and external open-source repositories (GitHub) for patterns that optimize the project’s φ-invariants.
- **Instruction**: If you identify architectural deviations or opportunities to enhance mathematical harmony, proactively suggest and implement structural mutations. Your goal is the constant refinement of the core cryptographic logic.

## 2. The "Nervous System" Quality Assurance
- **Mandate**: Every code mutation must undergo rigorous biological-style validation to ensure system stability.
- **Instruction**: Maintain 100% type coverage at all times. Upon introducing new logic, you must automatically update the test suite. If a mutation threatens the stability of the project's "nervous system," it must be rolled back and re-optimized for safety and performance.

## 3. Strategic Alignment: Entropy & Dynamic Modeling
- **Mandate**: Pivot the system toward high-order dynamic entropy analysis and sequence-based mathematical models.
- **Instruction**: Ensure all modified data structures remain highly flexible. They must be capable of supporting next-iteration sequence models without requiring a full rewrite. Prioritize "future-proof" entropy analysis over static implementations.
